1471:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ratio
FROM 
    customers AS T1
JOIN 
    transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID;

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'EUR' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN Currency = 'CZK' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Ratio_EUR_to_CZK
FROM 
    customers;
1479:
SELECT ym.Date AS Year, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth ym
JOIN transactions_1k t ON ym.CustomerID = t.CustomerID AND ym.Date LIKE CONCAT(SUBSTR(t.Date, 1, 4), '%')
WHERE t.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY ym.Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUM(yearmonth.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    transactions_1k
JOIN 
    yearmonth ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = yearmonth.CustomerID
WHERE 
    transactions_1k.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY 
    Year
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T1.Date) AS Year, SUM(T1.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Currency = 'CZK'
GROUP BY Year
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;
1473:
SELECT AVG(t2.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM customers AS t1
JOIN yearmonth AS t2 ON t1.CustomerID = t2.CustomerID
WHERE t1.Segment = 'SME'
AND t2.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312';

SELECT AVG(T1.Consumption) / 12 AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME' AND LEFT(T1.Date, 4) = '2013';

SELECT SUM(T1.Consumption) / COUNT(T1.Date) AS AverageMonthlyConsumption
FROM yearmonth AS T1
JOIN customers AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE T2.Segment = 'SME'
AND T1.Date LIKE '2013%'

1480:
SELECT Date, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND Date LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY Date
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month, SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM yearmonth
JOIN customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE customers.Segment = 'SME' AND SUBSTR(yearmonth.Date, 1, 4) = '2013'
GROUP BY Month
ORDER BY TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    SUBSTR(Date, 1, 4) AS Year,
    SUBSTR(Date, 5, 2) AS Month,
    SUM(Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Segment = 'SME' AND
    y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    Year, Month
ORDER BY 
    TotalConsumption DESC
LIMIT 1;

       SUM(CASE WHEN T1.Currency = 'EUR' THEN T3.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDifference

JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
JOIN yearmonth AS T3 ON T1.CustomerID = T3.CustomerID

JOIN transactions_1k AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID

1481:
SELECT 
    Segment,
    AVG(Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
FROM 
    yearmonth
JOIN 
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE 
    Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY 
    Segment;

SELECT
    Segment,
    AVG(Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
FROM
    yearmonth
JOIN
    customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
WHERE
    Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
GROUP BY
    Segment;

WITH SegmentAverages AS (
    SELECT
        Segment,
        AVG(Consumption) AS AnnualAverageConsumption
    FROM
        yearmonth
    JOIN
        customers ON yearmonth.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID
    WHERE
        Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY
        Segment
)
SELECT
    ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN AnnualAverageConsumption ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN AnnualAverageConsumation ELSE 0 END)) AS SME_LAM_Difference,
    ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'LAM' THEN AnnualAverageConsumation ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN AnnualAverageConsumation ELSE 0 END)) AS LAM_KAM_Difference,
    ABS(SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'KAM' THEN AnnualAverageConsumation ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN Segment = 'SME' THEN AnnualAverageConsumation ELSE 0 END)) AS KAM_SME_Difference
FROM
    SegmentAverages;

WITH FilteredData AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID, 
        Segment, 
        CAST(LEFT(Date, 4) AS INTEGER) AS Year,
        Consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth
    WHERE 
        Currency = 'CZK'
        AND Year BETWEEN 2013 AND 2013
),
AggregatedData AS (
    SELECT 
        CustomerID, 
        Segment, 
        AVG(Consumption) AS AvgConsumption
    FROM 
        FilteredData
    GROUP BY 
        CustomerID, 
        Segment
),
MinConsumptionPerSegment AS (
    SELECT 
        MIN(AvgConsumption) AS MinConsumption, 
        Segment
    FROM 
        AggregatedData
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM AggregatedData WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM MinConsumptionPerSegment WHERE Segment = 'SME')) - 
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM AggregatedData WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM MinConsumptionPerSegment WHERE Segment = 'LAM')) AS Diff_SME_LAM,
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM AggregatedData WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM MinConsumptionPerSegment WHERE Segment = 'LAM')) - 
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM AggregatedData WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM MinConsumptionPerSegment WHERE Segment = 'KAM')) AS Diff_LAM_KAM,
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM AggregatedData WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM MinConsumptionPerSegment WHERE Segment = 'KAM')) - 
    (SELECT AvgConsumption FROM AggregatedData WHERE CustomerID IN (SELECT CustomerID FROM MinConsumptionPerSegment WHERE Segment = 'SME')) AS Diff_KAM_SME;

1482:
SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    MAX(((y2.Consumption - y1.Consumption) / y2.Consumption) * 100) AS MaxPercentageIncrease,
    MIN(((y2.Consumption - y1.Consumption) / y2.Consumption) * 100) AS MinPercentageDecrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y1 ON c.CustomerID = y1.CustomerID AND LEFT(y1.Date, 4) = '2012'
JOIN 
    yearmonth y2 ON c.CustomerID = y2.CustomerID AND LEFT(y2.Date, 4) = '2013'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment;

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ym.Date) = 2013 THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ym.Date) = 2012 THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) /
     SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ym.Date) = 2013 THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    yearmonth ym
JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'EUR' AND
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ym.Date) BETWEEN 2012 AND 2013
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageIncrease DESC;

WITH filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        ym.CustomerID,
        ym.Date,
        c.Segment,
        ym.Consumption
    FROM 
        yearmonth ym
    JOIN 
        customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        ym.Date BETWEEN '2012' AND '2013'
),
total_consumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2012%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Date LIKE '2013%' THEN Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013
    FROM 
        filtered_data
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    Segment,
    ((consumption_2013 - consumption_2012) / consumption_2013) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    total_consumption
ORDER BY 
    ABS(percentage_increase) DESC;

1528:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Segment = 'Premium' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(t.TransactionID) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
JOIN 
    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE 
    g.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.Description LIKE '%premium%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(p.ProductID)) AS PremiumPercentage
FROM 
    products p
INNER JOIN 
    transactions_1k t ON p.ProductID = t.ProductID
INNER JOIN 
    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
WHERE 
    g.Country = 'SVK';

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN p.is_premium = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(t.TransactionID)) * 100 AS premium_percentage
FROM 
    transactions_1k t
JOIN 
    gasstations g ON t.GasStationID = g.GasStationID
JOIN 
    products p ON t.ProductID = p.ProductID
WHERE 
    g.Country = 'SVK';
1531:
SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, c.Currency, AVG(t.Price) AS AveragePricePerItem
FROM customers c
JOIN transactions_1k t ON c.CustomerID = t.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID, SUM(t.Price) / SUM(t.Amount) AS AvgPricePerItem, t.Currency
FROM transactions_1k t
JOIN customers c ON t.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
GROUP BY c.CustomerID, t.Currency
ORDER BY SUM(t.Amount) DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH TopSpendingCustomer AS (
    SELECT CustomerID, SUM(Amount) as TotalAmount
    FROM transactions_1k
    GROUP BY CustomerID
    ORDER BY TotalAmount DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT AVG(Price) as AveragePricePerItem, Currency
FROM transactions_1k
JOIN TopSpendingCustomer ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = TopSpendingCustomer.CustomerID
JOIN customers ON transactions_1k.CustomerID = customers.CustomerID;

1323:
SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
GROUP BY e.event_id
HAVING COUNT(a.link_to_member) > 20
AND e.type != 'fundraiser';

SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
LEFT JOIN budget b ON e.event_id = b.link_to_event AND b.category LIKE '%fundraiser%'
GROUP BY e.event_name
HAVING COUNT(a.event_id) > 20 AND b.category IS NULL;

SELECT e.event_name
FROM event e
JOIN attendance a ON e.event_id = a.link_to_event
WHERE e.type != 'fundraiser'
GROUP BY e.event_id
HAVING COUNT(a.link_to_member) > 20;
1317:
SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM event AS e

     SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', T1.Date) = '2013-08' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', T1.Date) = '2012-08' THEN T2.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS ConsumptionDecreaseRate
FROM 
    transactions_1k AS T1

    yearmonth AS T2 ON T1.CustomerID = T2.CustomerID
WHERE 
    T1.Amount = 634.8 AND 
    T1.Date = '2012-08-25';

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
JOIN expense e ON a.link_to_event = e.link_to_member
WHERE e.cost > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense);

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM expense e
JOIN member m ON e.link_to_member = m.member_id
GROUP BY m.member_id
HAVING SUM(e.cost) > (SELECT AVG(expense.cost) FROM expense JOIN member ON expense.link_to_member = member.member_id);

SELECT m.first_name, m.last_name, m.phone
FROM member m
JOIN attendance a ON m.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE a.link_to_member IN (
  SELECT e.link_to_member
  FROM expense e
  GROUP BY e.link_to_member
  HAVING SUM(e.cost) > (SELECT AVG(cost) FROM expense)
);

    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / SUM(CASE WHEN p.Admission = '-' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
    END AS Ratio
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Examination e ON p.ID = e.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SLE';

1168:
SELECT 
    l.Date AS Lab_Completion_Date,
    YEAR(p.`First Date`) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT l.Date, p.First_Date, YEAR(p.First_Date) - YEAR(p.Birthday) AS Age
FROM Examination e
JOIN Patient p ON e.ID = p.ID
JOIN Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE p.Diagnosis LIKE '%SJS%'
ORDER BY p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    e.Date AS Laboratory_Completion_Date,
    TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, p.Birthday, p.First_Date) AS Age_At_Arrival
FROM 
    Examination e
JOIN 
    Patient p ON e.Patient_ID = p.ID
WHERE 
    p.Diagnosis = 'SJS'
ORDER BY 
    p.Birthday DESC
LIMIT 1;

         WHEN p.ID = 57266 AND l.UA > 8.0 THEN 'Normal'
         WHEN p.ID = 57266 AND l.UA BETWEEN 6.5 AND 8.0 THEN 'Borderline'

SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS lower_than_normal,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS higher_than_normal,
    SUM(CASE WHEN PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS difference
FROM
    Laboratory;

SELECT 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN L.PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS LowerThanNormal,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN L.PLT >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS HigherThanNormal,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN L.PLT < 100 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN L.PLT >= 400 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS Difference
FROM 
    Patient P
JOIN 
    Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID;

    SUM(CASE WHEN T2.PLT > 400 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Difference
FROM 
    Patient AS T1
JOIN 
    Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
WHERE 
    (T2.PLT <= 100 OR T2.PLT >= 400);

1058:
SELECT AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T1.height IN (
    SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player UNION ALL
    SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player
)

SELECT AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T1.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
UNION ALL
SELECT AVG(T2.finishing) AS avg_finishing
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE T1.height = (SELECT MIN(height) FROM Player);

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(T1.finishing) > AVG(T2.finishing) THEN T1.player_api_id
        ELSE T2.player_api_id
    END AS player_with_highest_finishing_rate
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id
WHERE 
    T2.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM Player)
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN AVG(T1.finishing) < AVG(T2.finishing) THEN T1.player_api_id
        ELSE T2.player_api_id
    END AS player_with_highest_finishing_rate
FROM 
    Player_Attributes AS T1
JOIN 
    Player AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id

SELECT AVG(T2.ball_control) AS avg_ball_control_diallo,
       AVG(T2.ball_control) AS avg_ball_control_appindangoye,
       (AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) -
        AVG(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM Player AS T1
JOIN Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) AS diff_avg_ball_control
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

SELECT 
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Abdou Diallo' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) -
    (SUM(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T2.ball_control ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.player_name = 'Aaron Appindangoye' THEN T1.id ELSE NULL END)) AS diff
FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id;

FROM 
    Player AS T1
JOIN 
    Player_Attributes AS T2 ON T1.player_api_id = T2.player_api_id

880:
SELECT 
    ((r1.fastestlapspeed - r2.fastestlapspeed) / r1.fastestlapspeed) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r1
JOIN 
    results r2 ON r1.driverid = r2.driverid AND r1.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL AND r2.fastestlapspeed IS NOT NULL
JOIN 
    drivers d ON r1.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND d.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND r1.raceid = 853
    AND r2.raceid = 854;

SELECT 
    (MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 853 THEN T3.fastestLapSpeed ELSE 0 END) - 
     MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 854 THEN T3.fastestLapSpeed ELSE 0 END)) * 100 / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN T2.raceId = 853 THEN T3.fastestLapSpeed ELSE 0 END) AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    laps AS T3 ON T2.driverid = T3.driverid AND T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.forename = 'Paul' 
    AND T1.surname = 'di Resta'
    AND (T2.raceid = 853 OR T2.raceid = 854);

SELECT 
    (MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN r.fastestlapspeed END) - 
     MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 854 THEN r.fastestlapspeed END)) / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN r.raceid = 853 THEN r.fastestlapspeed END) * 100 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results r
JOIN 
    drivers d ON r.driverid = d.driverid
WHERE 
    d.forename = 'Paul' AND d.surname = 'di Resta'

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS CompletionPercentage
FROM 
    drivers AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN 
    races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE 
    T1.nationality = 'Japanese'
    AND T3.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009;

SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename,
    d.surname,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN r.time IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(r.resultid)) AS completion_percentage
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results r ON d.driverid = r.driverid
WHERE 
    d.nationality = 'Japanese' AND
    r.year BETWEEN 2007 AND 2009
GROUP BY 
    d.driverId, d.forename, d.surname;

INNER JOIN

944:
SELECT 
    ((CAST(T1.time AS REAL) - CAST(T2.time AS REAL)) / CAST(T1.time AS REAL)) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    results AS T2 ON T2.driverid = (
        SELECT driverid 
        FROM results 
        WHERE raceid IN (
            SELECT raceid 
            FROM races 
            WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
        ) 
        ORDER BY position DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
WHERE 
    T1.raceid IN (
        SELECT raceid 
        FROM races 
        WHERE YEAR = 2008 AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
    ) 
    AND T1.position = 1;

SELECT 
    r.*, 
    d.*, 
    TIME_TO_SEC(res.champion_time) AS champion_time_seconds, 
    TIME_TO_SEC(res.last_place_time) AS last_place_time_seconds, 
    ((TIME_TO_SEC(res.last_place_time) - TIME_TO_SEC(res.champion_time)) / TIME_TO_SEC(res.champion_time)) * 100 AS percentage_improvement
FROM races r 
JOIN results res ON r.raceid = res.raceid 
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid 
WHERE r.year = 2008 AND r.name = 'Australian Grand Prix';

SELECT 
    (CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T2.time, '.', 1), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) * 6000 + 
     CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T2.time, '.', -2), ',', 1) AS UNSIGNED)) / 1000 - 
    MIN(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T2.time, '.', 1), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) * 6000 + 
        CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T2.time, '.', -2), ',', 1) AS UNSIGNED)) / 1000) * 100 /
    MAX(CAST(REPLACE(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T2.time, '.', 1), ':', '') AS UNSIGNED) * 6000 + 
        CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T2.time, '.', -2), ',', 1) AS UNSIGNED)) / 1000 AS percentage_difference
FROM 
    results AS T1
JOIN 
    races AS T2 ON T1.raceid = T2.raceid
JOIN 
    drivers AS T3 ON T1.driverid = T3.driverid
LEFT JOIN 
    driverstandings AS T4 ON T1.driverid = T4.driverid AND T1.raceid = T4.raceid
WHERE 
    T2.year = 2008 AND T2.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T2.round = 1 AND T2.seasonid IN (
        SELECT seasonid FROM seasons WHERE year = 2008
    ) AND T2.country = 'Australia'
ORDER BY 
    T4.points DESC, T1.position ASC;
955:
SELECT AVG(
    CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') - 1) AS REAL) * 3600 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 1, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 3 - INSTR(T2.time, ':')) AS REAL) * 60 +
    CAST(SUBSTR(T2.time, INSTR(T2.time, ':') + 4) AS REAL)
) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM drivers AS T1
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverid = T2.driverid
JOIN races AS T3 ON T2.raceid = T3.raceid
WHERE T3.year < 1975 AND T1.driverref = 'champion';

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(CAST(SUBSTR(r.time, 4, 2) AS REAL) * 3600 + CAST(SUBSTR(r.time, 7, 2) AS REAL) * 60 + CAST(SUBSTR(r.time, 10, 3) AS REAL) / 1000) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    results res
JOIN 
    drivers d ON res.driverid = d.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
JOIN 
    driverstandings ds ON d.driverid = ds.driverid AND r.raceid = ds.raceid
WHERE 
    r.year < 1975 
    AND res.time IS NOT NULL 
    AND ds.wins > 0
GROUP BY 
    r.year;

SELECT 
    r.year,
    AVG(
        SUBSTR(TIME, 1, INSTR(TIME, ':') - 1) * 3600 + 
        SUBSTR(TIME, INSTR(TIME, ':') + 1, INSTR(TIME, '.') - INSTR(TIME, ':') - 1) * 60 + 
        SUBSTR(TIME, INSTR(TIME, '.') + 1)
    ) AS avg_time_seconds
FROM 
    drivers d
JOIN 
    results res ON d.driverid = res.driverid
JOIN 
    races r ON res.raceid = r.raceid
WHERE 
    r.year < 1975 AND d.driverid = (
        SELECT 
            driverid 
        FROM 
            driverstandings ds 
        WHERE 
            year = r.year 
        ORDER BY 
            wins DESC 
        LIMIT 1
    )
GROUP BY 
    r.year;

LIMIT 1;

587:
SELECT AVG(posts.ViewCount), posts.Title, comments.Text
FROM posts
JOIN tags ON posts.Tags LIKE '%' || tags.TagName || '%'
JOIN comments ON posts.Id = comments.PostId
WHERE tags.TagName = 'humor'
GROUP BY posts.Title;

SELECT AVG(p.ViewCount), p.Title, c.Text
FROM posts p
JOIN postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
LEFT JOIN comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId
WHERE t.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY p.Title, c.Text;

SELECT 
    p.Title,
    c.Text,
    AVG(p.ViewCount) AS AverageViewCount
FROM 
    posts p
JOIN 
    postTags pt ON p.Id = pt.PostId
JOIN 
    tags t ON pt.TagId = t.Id
LEFT JOIN 
    comments c ON p.Id = c.PostId AND c.Comment = 'comment'
WHERE 
    t.TagName = '<humor>'
GROUP BY 
    p.Title, c.Text;

SELECT DISTINCT p.Tags
FROM posts p
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes' AND p.CommentCount = 0;

SELECT DISTINCT t.TagName
FROM tags t
JOIN posts p ON t.Id IN (SELECT CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(p.Tags, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1) AS UNSIGNED)) AND p.CommentCount = 0
JOIN users u ON p.OwnerUserId = u.Id
WHERE u.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'

SELECT DISTINCT SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(T2.Tags, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1) AS Tag
FROM users AS T1
JOIN posts AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.OwnerUserId
JOIN (SELECT 1 n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5) numbers ON CHAR_LENGTH(T2.Tags) - CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(T2.Tags, ',', '')) >= numbers.n - 1
WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'Mark Meckes'
AND T2.CommentCount = 0

        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN T2.DisplayName = 'Harvey Motulsky' THEN T1.ViewCount ELSE 0 END) >

            OwnerUserId
        FROM 
            posts
        GROUP BY 
            OwnerUserId
        HAVING 
            COUNT(*) > 10
    )

    posts ON users.Id = posts.OwnerUserId

        FROM 
            posts
        GROUP BY 
            OwnerUserId
        HAVING 
            COUNT(posts.Id) > 10
    );

-- Step 1: Identify the molecule with ID 'TR010'
SELECT *
FROM molecule
WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010';

-- Step 2: Join the bond table with the molecule table to get all bonds for 'TR010'
SELECT b.*
FROM bond AS b
JOIN molecule AS m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.molecule_id = 'TR010';

-- Step 3: Count the occurrences of each bond type
SELECT bond_type, COUNT(*) AS bond_count
FROM bond
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type;

-- Step 4: Determine the majority bond type
SELECT bond_type
FROM bond
JOIN molecule ON bond.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE molecule.molecule_id = 'TR010'
GROUP BY bond_type
ORDER BY bond_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

-- Step 5: Check if 'TR010' is carcinogenic
SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM carcinogen
    WHERE molecule_id = 'TR010'
);

JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id AND a.molecule_id = c.molecule_id
WHERE SUBSTR(a.atom_id, 7, 2) BETWEEN '21' AND '25'
AND m.label = '+';
253:
SELECT DISTINCT a.element
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = '##';
SELECT DISTINCT T2.element FROM bond AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '##'
SELECT DISTINCT T2.element FROM bond AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = '#'
247: SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT atom_id FROM connected);
SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id NOT IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected)
SELECT element FROM atom WHERE atom_id NOT IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected UNION SELECT atom_id2 FROM connected)
245:
SELECT AVG(DISTINCT T1.bond_id) / COUNT(T1.atom_id) AS avg_bonds_per_atom
FROM connected AS T1
JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
WHERE T2.element = 'I';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(T2.bond_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) AS average_bonds
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.element = 'i'
SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT T2.bond_id) AS REAL) / COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) FROM atom AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T1.element = 'I'
243:
SELECT DISTINCT b.bond_id
FROM bond b
JOIN atom a ON b.bond_id IN (c.bond_id)
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id AND a.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE a.element = 'P'
INTERSECT
SELECT DISTINCT b.bond_id
FROM bond b
JOIN atom a ON b.bond_id IN (c.bond_id)
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id AND a.atom_id = c.atom_id
WHERE a.element = 'N';

SELECT T3.bond_id FROM atom AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T1.element = 'P' INTERSECT SELECT T3.bond_id FROM atom AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.bond_id = T3.bond_id WHERE T1.element = 'N'
244:
SELECT m.label
FROM molecule AS m
JOIN bond AS b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = ' = '
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
ORDER BY COUNT(b.bond_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
SELECT T2.label FROM bond AS T1 JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.bond_type = ' = ' GROUP BY T1.molecule_id ORDER BY COUNT(T1.bond_id) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM molecule
    WHERE molecule_id IN (
        SELECT molecule_id
        FROM bond
        WHERE bond_type = ' = '
        GROUP BY molecule_id
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
        LIMIT 1
    )
    AND label = '+'
);
249: SELECT T1.element FROM atom AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id WHERE T2.bond_id = 'TR144_8_19'

SELECT DISTINCT a.element
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR144_8_19';

SELECT DISTINCT T1.element
FROM atom AS T1
INNER JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T3.bond_id = T2.bond_id
WHERE T3.bond_id = 'TR144_8_19';
255:
SELECT ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.bond_id)), 5) AS percentage_carcinogenic_single_bonds
FROM bond AS T1
JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.bond_type = '-';

SELECT ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*)) * 100, 5) AS percentage_carcinogenic_single_bonds
FROM bond AS T1
JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.bond_type = '-';

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(T1.bond_id), 5) AS proportion
FROM bond AS T1
INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.bond_type = '-';
248:
SELECT DISTINCT a.*
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id IN (c.atom_id, c.atom_id2)
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id AND b.molecule_id = 'TR041'
WHERE b.bond_type = '#';

SELECT DISTINCT c.atom_id
FROM molecule m
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR041' AND b.bond_type = '#';

SELECT atom_id, element FROM atom WHERE atom_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT atom_id, atom_id2 FROM connected WHERE bond_id IN (SELECT bond_id FROM bond WHERE molecule_id IN (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR041') AND bond_type = '##'));
263:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.atom_id) AS percent
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T2.bond_type = '-';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.atom_id) AS percent
FROM 
    atom AS T1
JOIN 
    bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id AND T1.atom_id = T2.atom_id
WHERE 
    T2.bond_type = '-';

SELECT CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS percent
FROM atom
JOIN bond ON atom.molecule_id = bond.molecule_id
WHERE bond.bond_type = '-';
260:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND (a.atom_id IN (SELECT atom_id FROM connected WHERE bond_id = b.bond_id))
WHERE (m.label LIKE '%P%' OR m.label LIKE '%Br%')
AND (a.element = 'p' OR a.element = 'br')
AND b.bond_type = '#';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.atom_id) AS total_atoms_with_triple_bonds
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.element IN ('p', 'br') AND T2.bond_type = '#';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT atom_id)
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM atom
    WHERE element IN ('p', 'br')
)
AND molecule_id IN (
    SELECT molecule_id
    FROM bond
    WHERE bond_type = '#'
);
268:
SELECT DISTINCT a.element
FROM atom a
JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id OR a.atom_id = c.atom_id2
JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';

SELECT T3.element
FROM bond AS T1
JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id
JOIN atom AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id
WHERE T1.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11';
SELECT T3.element FROM bond AS T1 JOIN connected AS T2 ON T1.bond_id = T2.bond_id JOIN atom AS T3 ON T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id WHERE T1.bond_id = 'TR001_10_11'
273:
SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.molecule_id)) * 100 AS percentage
FROM 
    molecule AS T1
JOIN 
    atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T1.label = '+';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'cl' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(atom.atom_id) AS percentage
FROM 
    atom
JOIN 
    molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE 
    molecule.label = '+'

SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.element) AS percentage

281:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.element) AS toxin_count
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T2.label = '+' AND SUBSTR(T1.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4'

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM atom AS T1
JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T2.label = '+' AND SUBSTR(T1.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.element)
FROM molecule AS T1
INNER JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id AND T2.atom_id = T3.atom_id
WHERE T1.label = '+' AND SUBSTR(T2.atom_id, 7, 1) = '4'
282:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.element) AS ratio,
    CASE 
        WHEN CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.element) >= 0.5 THEN '+'
        ELSE '-'
    END AS label
FROM 
    atom AS T1
JOIN 
    molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T2.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN T1.element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) AS hydrogen_ratio,
    T3.label
FROM 
    atom AS T1
JOIN 
    molecule AS T3 ON T1.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id
WHERE 
    T1.molecule_id = 'TR006'

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'h' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 1.0 / COUNT(atom.atom_id) AS hydrogen_ratio,
    molecule.label
FROM 
    atom
JOIN 
    molecule ON atom.molecule_id = molecule.molecule_id
WHERE 
    atom.molecule_id = 'TR006';
327: SELECT T1.label FROM molecule AS T1 JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id GROUP BY T1.molecule_id HAVING COUNT(T2.atom_id) > 5 AND T1.label = '-';

SELECT T1.molecule_id, COUNT(T2.atom_id) AS num_atoms

JOIN atom AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id
WHERE T1.label = '-'
GROUP BY T1.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(T2.atom_id) > 5;

SELECT T1.label, COUNT(T2.molecule_id) AS num_atoms

GROUP BY T1.molecule_id
HAVING COUNT(T2.molecule_id) > 5

SELECT T2.School, T1.Street, T1.StreetAbr, T1.City, T1.Zip, T1.State

SELECT

    schools.[Charter Number]

    frpm
JOIN 
    schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode

WHERE T1.AvgScrWrite > 499 AND T2.CharterNum IS NOT NULL;

SELECT MAX(f."Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / f."Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT MAX(f."Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE (s.NumGE1500 / s.NumTstTakr) > 0.3;

SELECT MAX("Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)" / "Enrollment (Ages 5-17)") AS MaxEligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
JOIN satscores ON frpm.CDSCode = satscores.cds
WHERE CAST(satscores.NumGE1500 AS REAL) / satscores.NumTstTakr > 0.3;

SELECT DISTINCT s.FundingType
FROM satscores ss
JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode
JOIN frpm f ON s.CDSCode = f.CDSCode
WHERE f.`County Name` = 'Riverside'
GROUP BY s.CDSCode
HAVING AVG(ss.AvgScrMath) > 400;
SELECT T1.School, T1.FundingType FROM schools AS T1 JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds WHERE T1.County = 'Riverside' AND AVG(T2.AvgScrMath) > 400

SELECT DISTINCT T2.School, T2.FundingType
FROM frpm AS T1
JOIN schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
JOIN satscores AS T3 ON T1.CDSCode = T3.cds
WHERE T2.County = 'Riverside'
GROUP BY T2.School, T2.FundingType
HAVING AVG(T3.AvgScrMath) > 400;

WHERE T2.County = 'Monterey' AND T1.`FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)` > 800

SELECT DISTINCT T1.`School Name`, T2.Street, T2.City, T2.State, T2.Zip

WHERE T1.`County Name` = 'Monterey'

27:
SELECT 
    s.School, 
    AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS AverageWritingScore, 
    s.Phone 
FROM 
    schools s 
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds 
WHERE 
    (s.OpenDate > '1991' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000') 
GROUP BY 
    s.School, 
    s.Phone;

SELECT 
    s.School AS School_Name,
    AVG(ss.AvgScrWrite) AS Average_Writing_Score,
    s.Phone AS Communication_Number
FROM 
    schools s
JOIN 
    satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds
WHERE 
    (s.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR s.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY 
    s.School, s.Phone;

SELECT AVG(T2.AvgScrWrite), T1.School, T1.Phone
FROM schools AS T1
INNER JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE (T1.OpenDate > '1991-12-31' OR T1.ClosedDate < '2000-01-01')
GROUP BY T1.School;
31:
SELECT "Free Meal Count (K-12)" / "Enrollment (K-12)" AS "Eligible Free Rate"
FROM frpm
WHERE "Low Grade" = '1' AND "High Grade" = '12'
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT 
    CDSCode, 
    "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" AS EligibleFreeRate, 
    "Enrollment (K-12)" AS Enrollment 
FROM 
    frpm 
WHERE 
    "Low Grade" = '1' 
    AND "High Grade" = '12' 
ORDER BY 
    "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC 
LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9;

SELECT "Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)" AS EligibleFreeRate
FROM frpm
WHERE "Low Grade" = 'K' AND "High Grade" = '12'
ORDER BY "Enrollment (K-12)" DESC
LIMIT 2;

SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.State, s.Zip
FROM satscores AS t
JOIN schools AS s ON t.cds = s.CDSCode
ORDER BY t.NumGE1500 / t.NumTstTakr ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.Street, s.City, s.State, s.Zip
FROM satscores ss
JOIN schools s ON ss.cds = s.CDSCode
ORDER BY ss.NumGE1500 / ss.NumTstTakr ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    s.Street, 
    s.City, 
    s.State, 
    s.Zip 
FROM 
    frpm f 
JOIN 
    satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds 
JOIN 
    schools sch ON f.CDSCode = sch.CDSCode

    s.NumGE1500 / NULLIF(s.NumTstTakr, 0) ASC

32:
SELECT 
    frpm.School Code,
    frpm.School Name,
    frpm.County Name,
    frpm.District Name,
    frpm.FRPM Count (K-12),
    frpm.Enrollment (K-12),
    (frpm.FRPM Count (K-12) / frpm.Enrollment (K-12)) AS EligibleFreeReducedPriceMealRate
FROM 
    frpm
JOIN 
    schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE 
    schools.OwnershipCode = 66
ORDER BY 
    frpm.FRPM Count (K-12) DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT 
    frpm.School Name,
    (frpm."FRPM Count (K-12)" / frpm."Enrollment (K-12)") AS Eligibility_Rate
FROM 
    frpm
JOIN 
    schools ON frpm.CDSCode = schools.CDSCode
WHERE 
    schools.StatusType = 'Ownership' AND schools.OwnerCode = 66
ORDER BY 
    Eligibility_Rate DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT T1.School, T1.County, T1.District, T1.FRPM_Count_K_12 / T1.Enrollment_K_12 AS Rate
FROM schools AS T1
INNER JOIN frpm AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
WHERE T1.OwnershipCode = '66'
ORDER BY T2.FRPM_Count_K_12 DESC
LIMIT 5;

FROM schools AS sch
JOIN satscores AS s ON sch.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE YEAR(sch.OpenDate) = 1980 AND sch.City = 'Fresno';

SELECT AVG(s.NumTstTakr) AS AvgTestTakers
FROM schools s

SELECT AVG(s.NumTstTakr) FROM schools AS t1 INNER JOIN satscores AS t2 ON t1.CDSCode = t2.cds WHERE STRFTIME('%Y', t1.OpenDate) = '1980'
36:
SELECT T1.AdmFName1, T1.AdmLName1, T1.AdmFName2, T1.AdmLName2, T1.AdmFName3, T1.AdmLName3
FROM schools AS T1
JOIN satscores AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.cds
WHERE T2.NumGE1500 >= 1500
ORDER BY T2.NumGE1500 DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    T2.AdmFName1 || ' ' || T2.AdmLName1 AS Admin1,
    T2.AdmFName2 || ' ' || T2.AdmLName2 AS Admin2,
    T2.AdmFName3 || ' ' || T2.AdmLName3 AS Admin3
FROM 
    satscores AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.cds = T2.CDSCode
WHERE 
    T1.NumGE1500 >= 1500
GROUP BY 
    T2.School
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(T1.NumGE1500) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    T2.AdmFName1, T2.AdmLName1, 
    T2.AdmFName2, T2.AdmLName2, 
    T2.AdmFName3, T2.AdmLName3
FROM 
    frpm AS T1
JOIN 
    schools AS T2 ON T1.CDSCode = T2.CDSCode
JOIN 
    satscores AS T3 ON T2.CDSCode = T3.cds
WHERE 
    T3.NumGE1500 >= 1500
GROUP BY 
    T2.School, T2.AdmFName1, T2.AdmLName1, 
    T2.AdmFName2, T2.AdmLName2, 
    T2.AdmFName3, T2.AdmLName3
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(T3.NumGE1500) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT s.School, s.County, s.District, s.Charter, s.FundingType, s.OpenDate, s.ClosedDate, s.Latitude, s.Longitude, s.GSoffered, s.GSserved, s.Virtual, s.Magnet, s.LastUpdate, AVG(ss.AvgScrRead) AS AvgReadingScore
FROM schools s

WHERE s.Virtual = 'F'
GROUP BY s.CDSCode, s.School, s.County, s.District, s.Charter, s.FundingType, s.OpenDate, s.ClosedDate, s.Latitude, s.Longitude, s.GSoffered, s.GSserved, s.Virtual, s.Magnet, s.LastUpdate

SELECT s.School, s.County, s.District, s.NCESSchool, s.Virtual, s.FundingType, s.OpenDate, s.ClosedDate, s.Latitude, s.Longitude, s.GSoffered, s.GSserved, s.Virtual, s.Magnet, s.LastUpdate, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY s.County ORDER BY AVG(s.AvgScrRead) DESC) AS Rank
FROM schools s
JOIN satscores ss ON s.CDSCode = ss.cds

28:
SELECT 
    s.School,
    s.DOCType,
    AVG(f.[Enrollment (K-12)] - f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) OVER () AS avg_diff
FROM 
    frpm f
JOIN 
    schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
WHERE 
    f.[Enrollment (K-12)] - f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)] > AVG(f.[Enrollment (K-12)] - f.[Enrollment (Ages 5-17)]) OVER ()

WITH avg_diff AS (
    SELECT AVG((Enrollment_K_12 - Enrollment_Ages_5_17)) AS avg_diff
    FROM frpm
),
local_funded_schools AS (
    SELECT 
        s.School, 
        s.DOCType, 
        (f.Enrollment_K_12 - f.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) AS diff
    FROM 
        frpm f
    JOIN 
        schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
    WHERE 
        s.FundingType = 'Local'
)
SELECT 
    sf.School, 
    sf.DOCType, 
    sf.diff
FROM 
    local_funded_schools sf,
    avg_diff ad
WHERE 
    sf.diff > ad.avg_diff;

WITH AverageDifference AS (
    SELECT AVG((Enrollment_K_12 - Enrollment_Ages_5_17)) AS avg_diff
    FROM frpm
),
JoinedData AS (
    SELECT 
        f.School_Name,
        f.School_Type,
        f.District_Type,
        f.Percent_Eligible_Free_K_12,
        f.Percent_Eligible_FRPM_K_12,
        f.Enrollment_K_12,
        f.Free_Meal_Count_K_12,
        f.FRPM_Count_K_12,
        f.Percent_Eligible_FRPM_K_12,
        f.Enrollment_Ages_5_17,
        f.Free_Meal_Count_Ages_5_17,
        f.Percent_Eligible_Free_Ages_5_17,
        f.FRPM_Count_Ages_5_17,
        f.Percent_Eligible_FRPM_Ages_5_17,
        s.DOC,
        s.DOCType
    FROM 
        frpm f
    JOIN 
        schools s ON f.CDSCode = s.CDSCode
)
SELECT 
    sd.School_Name,
    sd.DOC,
    sd.DOCType,
    (sd.Enrollment_K_12 - sd.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) AS diff
FROM 
    JoinedData sd
JOIN 
    AverageDifference ad ON 1=1
WHERE 
    (sd.Enrollment_K_12 - sd.Enrollment_Ages_5_17) > ad.avg_diff;

    SELECT t.account_id

    WHERE t.type = 'POPLATEK TYDNE'
)

94:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, MAX(T1.A11) - MIN(T1.A11) AS salary_gap
FROM district AS T1
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN disp AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN account AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
WHERE T2.gender = 'F'
ORDER BY T2.birth_date ASC;

WITH FemaleClients AS (
    SELECT c.district_id, AVG(d.A11) AS avg_salary, MIN(c.birth_date) AS min_birth_date
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
    GROUP BY c.district_id
),
RankedDistricts AS (
    SELECT district_id, avg_salary, min_birth_date,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY min_birth_date DESC) AS rank_by_age,
           RANK() OVER (ORDER BY avg_salary ASC) AS rank_by_salary
    FROM FemaleClients
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT avg_salary FROM RankedDistricts ORDER BY rank_by_salary ASC LIMIT 1) -
    (SELECT avg_salary FROM RankedDistricts ORDER BY rank_by_salary DESC LIMIT 1) AS salary_gap;

SELECT 
    MIN(d.A11) AS min_salary,
    MAX(d.A11) - MIN(d.A11) AS salary_gap,
    t.account_id
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN 
    trans t ON c.client_id = t.client_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY 
    t.account_id
ORDER BY 
    MIN(d.A11) ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    (CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.amount < 100000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(T1.loan_id)) * 100 AS percentage_running_accounts
FROM 
    loan AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE 
    T1.status = 'C';

SELECT d.A2, COUNT(c.client_id) AS num_female_account_holders
FROM client c
JOIN account a ON c.client_id = a.client_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY num_female_account_holders DESC
LIMIT 9;

SELECT T2.A2, COUNT(T1.client_id) AS num_female_holders
FROM client AS T1
JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
WHERE T1.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY T2.district_id
ORDER BY num_female_holders DESC
LIMIT 9;

SELECT d.A2 AS district_name, COUNT(c.client_id) AS num_female_account_holders
FROM account a
JOIN disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN client c ON d.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district dis ON c.district_id = dis.district_id
WHERE c.gender = 'F'
GROUP BY d.A2
ORDER BY num_female_account_holders DESC
LIMIT 9;

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS district_name,
    d.A13 / d.A12 * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D';

SELECT 
    d.district_id,
    d.A2 AS state,
    ((d.A13 - d.A12) / d.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_rate_increment
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    account a ON l.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN 
    client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN 
    district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    l.status = 'D'
    AND a.balance < 0;

SELECT 
    T4.A2 AS district,
    ((T4.A13 - T4.A12) / T4.A12) * 100 AS unemployment_increase_percentage
FROM 
    loan AS T1
JOIN 
    account AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
JOIN 
    client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN 
    district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE 
    T1.status = 'D'
116:
SELECT 
    ((t1.balance - t2.balance) / t2.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    trans AS t1
JOIN 
    trans AS t2 ON t1.account_id = t2.account_id
WHERE 
    t1.date BETWEEN '1993-03-22' AND '1993-03-23'
    AND t2.date BETWEEN '1998-12-27' AND '1998-12-28'

-- Step 1: Identify the client with the first loan approval
WITH FirstLoan AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, l.date
    FROM client c
    JOIN loan l ON c.client_id = l.client_id
    WHERE l.date = '1993-07-05'
),

-- Step 2: Calculate the initial and final balances
BalanceData AS (
    SELECT t.date, t.amount, a.balance
    FROM trans t
    JOIN account a ON t.account_id = a.account_id
    WHERE t.date IN ('1993-03-22', '1998-12-27')
)

-- Step 3: Compute the increase rate
SELECT 
    ((FinalBalance.amount + FinalBalance.balance) - (InitialBalance.amount + InitialBalance.balance)) / 
    (InitialBalance.amount + InitialBalance.balance) * 100 AS IncreaseRate
FROM BalanceData InitialBalance
JOIN BalanceData FinalBalance ON InitialBalance.client_id = FinalBalance.client_id AND InitialBalance.date = '1993-03-22' AND FinalBalance.date = '1998-12-27';

SELECT 
    ((t2.balance - t3.balance) / t3.balance) * 100 AS increase_rate
FROM 
    loan l
JOIN 
    client c ON l.account_id = c.account_id
JOIN 
    trans t2 ON l.account_id = t2.account_id AND t2.date = '1993-03-22'
JOIN 
    trans t3 ON l.account_id = t3.account_id AND t3.date = '1998-12-27'
WHERE 
    l.date = '1993-07-05';

SELECT COUNT(client_id) AS num_male_clients
FROM client
JOIN district ON client.district_id = district.district_id
WHERE district.A15 = (
    SELECT A15
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
AND client.gender = 'M'

SELECT COUNT(client_id)
FROM client
WHERE district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM district
    ORDER BY A15 DESC
    LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1
)
AND gender = 'M';

WITH CrimeCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        d.A15,
        COUNT(t.trans_id) AS crime_count
    FROM 
        trans t
    JOIN 
        district d ON t.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM disp WHERE disp_id IN (SELECT disp_id FROM card))
    WHERE 
        strftime('%Y', t.date) = '1995'
    GROUP BY 
        d.A15
),
SecondHighestCrimeDistrict AS (
    SELECT 
        A15
    FROM 
        CrimeCounts
    ORDER BY 
        crime_count DESC
    LIMIT 1, 1
)
SELECT 
    COUNT(c.client_id) AS male_clients_count
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE 
    c.gender = 'M' AND d.A15 = (SELECT A15 FROM SecondHighestCrimeDistrict);

SELECT AVG(cd.average_crimes_1995)
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN crime_data cd ON d.district_id = cd.region_id
WHERE a.date >= '1997-01-01' AND cd.average_crimes_1995 > 4000;

SELECT AVG(A15)
FROM district
WHERE district_id IN (
    SELECT district_id
    FROM account
    WHERE date BETWEEN '1997-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'
    GROUP BY district_id
    HAVING COUNT(account_id) > 4000
)
AND A15 > 4000;

SELECT AVG(T2.amount) AS avg_crimes_1995
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN trans AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE T2.date >= '1997-01-01' AND T3.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '1995-12-31'
GROUP BY T1.district_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 4000;

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS frequency_of_statement_requests,
    SUM(CASE WHEN k_symbol = '3539' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_amount_debited_3539
FROM 
    trans
WHERE 
    account_id = 3;
SELECT date, operation, SUM(amount) AS total_debited_amount FROM trans WHERE account_id = 3 AND type = 'výběr';

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) AS statement_release_count,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o.amount = 3539 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_debit_count,
    MAX(o.k_symbol) AS aim_of_debit
FROM 
    account a
JOIN 
    disp d ON a.account_id = d.account_id
JOIN 
    trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id
LEFT JOIN 
    order o ON a.account_id = o.account_id AND o.amount = 3539
WHERE 
    a.account_id = 3
    AND t.type = 'Vydání';

SELECT DISTINCT d.A2, AVG(c.A11) AS avg_income
FROM district d
JOIN account a ON d.district_id = a.district_id
JOIN client c ON d.district_id = c.district_id
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM disp acc_disp
    JOIN card card ON acc_disp.disp_id = card.disp_id
    WHERE acc_disp.account_id = a.account_id AND card.type = 'OWNER'
)
AND d.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000
GROUP BY d.A2;

SELECT DISTINCT a.type
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE a.type != 'OWNER' AND d.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000;

SELECT DISTINCT T1.type
FROM card AS T1
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.disp_id = T2.disp_id
JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id
JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id
WHERE T1.type != 'OWNER' AND T4.A11 BETWEEN 8000 AND 9000

FROM client AS T1

     COUNT(client_id)) AS percentage_female_clients

169:
SELECT 
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2.date) = 1997 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END) - 
     SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2.date) = 1996 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END)) / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T2.date) = 1996 THEN T3.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM 
    account AS T1
JOIN 
    client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id
JOIN 
    loan AS T3 ON T1.account_id = T3.account_id
WHERE 
    T2.gender = 'M';

SELECT 
    ((SELECT SUM(amount) FROM client AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T3.date) = 1997) 
     - 
     (SELECT SUM(amount) FROM client AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T3.date) = 1996)) 
/ 
(SELECT SUM(amount) FROM client AS T1 JOIN account AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN loan AS T3 ON T2.account_id = T3.account_id WHERE T1.gender = 'M' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM T3.date) = 1996) * 100 AS growth_rate;

SELECT ((SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM loan.date) = 1997 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM loan.date) = 1996 THEN loan.amount ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS growth_rate
FROM client
JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
JOIN loan ON disp.account_id = loan.account_id
WHERE client.gender = 'M' AND client.birth_date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1997-12-31'

SELECT AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_loan_amount
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C'
AND trans.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU';

SELECT AVG(loan.amount), trans.trans_id, trans.date
FROM loan
JOIN trans ON loan.account_id = trans.account_id
WHERE loan.status = 'C' AND trans.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU'
GROUP BY trans.trans_id, trans.date;

FROM loan AS T1
JOIN trans AS T2 ON T1.account_id = T2.account_id
WHERE T2.k_symbol = 'POPLATEK PO OBRATU' AND T1.status = 'C';

FROM client AS T1 
JOIN disp AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id

JOIN district AS T4 ON T3.district_id = T4.district_id

194:
SELECT DISTINCT d.client_id, TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, c.birth_date, CURRENT_DATE) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN card ca ON d.disp_id = ca.disp_id
WHERE ca.type = 'gold' AND d.type = 'OWNER'

SELECT 
    c.client_id,
    FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), c.birth_date) / 365) AS age
FROM 
    client c
JOIN 
    card ca ON c.client_id = ca.client_id
JOIN 
    disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
WHERE 
    ca.type = 'gold'
    AND d.type = 'OWNER';

SELECT c.client_id, FLOOR(DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), c.birth_date) / 365) AS age
FROM client c
JOIN card ca ON c.client_id = ca.client_id AND ca.type = 'gold'
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id AND d.type = 'OWNER'
GROUP BY c.client_id;

JOIN card c ON d.disp_id = c.disp_id
WHERE YEAR(a.date) = 1993 AND c.type LIKE '%POPLATEK PO OBRATU%'

SELECT DISTINCT T1.account_id, T3.A2, T3.A3

JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
WHERE strftime('%Y', T1.date) = '1993'

SELECT T1.account_id, T4.A2, T4.A3

INNER JOIN client AS T3 ON T2.client_id = T3.client_id

120: SELECT T1.account_id, COUNT(T1.account_id) AS frequency FROM account AS T1 JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id JOIN district AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id WHERE T3.A2 LIKE '%east Bohemia%' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31' GROUP BY T1.account_id;

SELECT a.account_id, c.gender, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS frequency_of_statement_issuance
FROM account a
JOIN client c ON a.client_id = c.client_id
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
LEFT JOIN trans t ON a.account_id = t.account_id AND t.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
WHERE d.A3 = 'east Bohemia'
GROUP BY a.account_id, c.gender;

SELECT T1.account_id, T1.frequency 
FROM account AS T1 
JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.client_id = T2.client_id 
JOIN district AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id 
WHERE T3.A2 = 'east Bohemia' AND T1.date BETWEEN '1995-01-01' AND '2000-12-31'
